parameters.query: SELECT id, service, severity, category, root_cause, recommended_action, metrics_snapshot, detected_at FROM incidents WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1;

SELECT 'recovery' AS kind, component AS source, status AS state, occurred_at AS at FROM recovery_log WHERE occurred_at BETWEEN (NOW() - INTERVAL '15 min') AND NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'error' AS kind, workflow_id AS source, node_name AS state, occurred_at AS at FROM workflow_errors WHERE occurred_at BETWEEN (NOW() - INTERVAL '15 min') AND NOW() ORDER BY at DESC LIMIT 30;

parameters.text:
You are a senior reliability engineer at Toyota Boshoku Bawal. Read the incident + the 15 minutes of context that surrounded it, and explain in plain English WHY the machine/service failed. Be specific. Cite the data.

Incident: {{ JSON.stringify($('Fetch Incident').item.json) }}
Context (recovery + workflow errors within 15 min): {{ JSON.stringify($('Fetch Recent Context').all().map(x => x.json)) }}

Output a JSON object with:
- narrative          (one paragraph, plain English, no jargon)
- factors            ([{factor, weight 0..1, evidence}])
- confidence         (0..1)
- suggested_action   (one specific next step)

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: {"narrative":"Machine YNC-L6 failed because hydraulic pressure dropped 14% in the 90 seconds before the cycle-time alert, while the operator was idle (no key-press for 4 minutes). The Triage Agent already flagged hydraulics; this confirms it.","factors":[{"factor":"hydraulic pressure drop","weight":0.7,"evidence":"PLC log line 14:32:08 pressure 142 -> 122 bar"}],"confidence":0.83,"suggested_action":"Replace hydraulic accumulator on YNC-L6 within 48h; verify operator-presence sensor."}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ok:true, incident_id: $("Fetch Incident").item.json.id, narrative: $("Why-Failed AI Agent").item.json.output.narrative, confidence: $("Why-Failed AI Agent").item.json.output.confidence}) }}
